fixture.description: Printed recipe page (Rice Robot style) containing two recipes on one photo. Primary test case for multi-recipe photo ingest.
notes: Image contains TWO distinct recipes; ingest must split them into separate meal cards.
Rice Robot cup units should be preserved or normalized with a note that they are appliance cup measures.

meal_cards.title: Cajun Dirty Rice
meal_cards.summary: Rice cooker dirty rice with ground beef, bell pepper, Cajun seasoning, and beef broth. Good with hot sauce on the side.

ingredients.name: long grain white rice
ingredients.display: 2 Rice Robot Rice cups of long grain white rice

ingredients.name: beef broth
ingredients.display: 2 1/2 Rice Robot Water cups of beef broth

steps: Rinse the rice thoroughly in a fine mesh sieve until the water runs clear.
Place the rice into the rice cooker, add the remaining ingredients and stir.
Close the lid and press the cook button.
meal_cards.blurb_from_source: I love this dish with a bottle of hot sauce on the side to really kick it up.

meal_cards.title: Fried Rice
meal_cards.summary: Rice cooker egg fried rice with jasmine rice, mixed vegetables, diced ham, eggs, and soy sauce.

ingredients.name: jasmine rice
ingredients.display: 2 Rice Robot Rice cups of Jasmine rice

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.display: 2 Rice Robot Water cups of water

ingredients.name: mixed vegetables
ingredients.display: 1 cup fresh or frozen mixed vegetables, such as peas, carrots, and corn
ingredients.notes: fresh or frozen; e.g. peas, carrots, corn

steps: Rinse the rice thoroughly in a fine mesh sieve until the water runs clear.
Place the rice into the rice cooker, add the remaining ingredients and stir.
Close the lid and press the cook button. Fluff and stir to combine once cooked.
meal_cards.blurb_from_source: Egg fried rice is one of my favorite dishes to make. I've cooked this dish on networks across the world from the Hallmark channel to the BBC. This is a fast track way to make it.
